programs.title: Israel and the Palestinians: The Road to 7th October
programs.desc: Recognized documentarian, Emmy and BAFTA winner, Norma Percy, deals with the Israeli-Palestinian conflict and asks how it is possible that the conflict escalated during the intense search for peace in the Middle East.The filmmakers begin with Israel's withdrawal from the Gaza Strip in September 2005.The program reveals the behind-the-scenes of decades-long diplomatic disputes until October 7, 2023.Percy's interviewees, including:Hillary Clinton, Tony Blair and leading Israeli and Palestinian politicians discuss the causes of the dispute and breakthrough events in relations between the parties.

programs.title: Top Gear
programs.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are back with another portion of automotive adventures.The presenters are very critical and the cars they check are subjected to various tests.

programs.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programs.desc: The competitors' task is to create a chain of correct answers.After each round, one person considered to be the weakest link is eliminated.The pressure increases with every passing minute.Hosted by Romesh Ranganathan.

programs.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire With Jeremy Clarkson
programs.desc: Jeremy Clarkson returns with new episodes of the popular game show.Each participant has a chance to win one million pounds.He is 15 questions away from winning.

programs.title: Top Gear
programs.desc: In the 18th series of the program, just like before: many amazing feats, crazy challenges, special reports and a sense of humor.
